description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style shelving unit featuring three spacious wooden shelves supported by a black metal frame. The frame is reinforced with diagonal cross-bracing on the sides, providing both structural stability and a distinctive visual pattern. The wood planks have a dark, weathered finish, contrasting with the matte, hammered texture of the metal. The open design allows for easy access from all sides, making it suitable for storing or displaying items in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or lofts. The absence of doors, drawers, or handles emphasizes its utilitarian function. Its sturdy construction suggests it can support heavy objects, making it ideal for practical storage needs.
description: A sturdy, industrial shelving unit with three dark wooden shelves and a black metal frame featuring cross-bracing. The open, utilitarian design is ideal for storage or display in urban settings.
description_view_0: This view highlights the side of the shelf, showcasing the prominent metal cross-bracing and the depth of the wooden shelves.
description_view_1: This view presents the shelving unit from the front, displaying the full width of the shelves and the open, accessible design.
description_view_2: This view mirrors the opposite side, again emphasizing the metal cross-bracing and the layered arrangement of the shelves.
description_view_3: This view shows the back of the unit, with the shelves and frame visible but less detail on the cross-bracing compared to the sides.
